flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rend Lake College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $7.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rend Lake College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rend Lake College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (8.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rend Lake College rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 (38.5% → 48.1%).
